category_sources: source_facts.description says Syncthing is an open source continuous file synchronization application.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo use the official Syncthing project name.
docs_sources: Official Syncthing documentation is hosted at docs.syncthing.net.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies continuous file synchronization; source_facts.executables lists the syncthing executable.
